{{Quote|Lucky for us it's not as fast as it is ugly!|[[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]]|<ref name="Ewoks 11">[[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' (1985) 11]]</ref>}}
The '''ra-lugg''' was a small, [[Color/Legends|red]], six-[[Limb/Legends|legged]] [[Spider/Legends|arachnid]] or [[Crustacean/Legends|crustacean]] native to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The ra-lugg possessed yellow or black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], two [[Limb/Legends|grasping pincers]], and a web-shooting tail to catch its prey, such as the tiny [[Fleebog]]s. One of these creatures in particular terrorized the Fleebog tunnels, until a dose of [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[growing powder]] caused it to reach a larger size. Frightened by its sudden change in size, the ra-lugg fled into the forest.

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' (1985) 11]] {{1st}}
